Bash(cd D:/nolan_lab/all_in_one && "C:/Users/andre/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe" -c "
import sys, torch, numpy as np
from PIL import Image
sys.path.insert\(0, 'D:/nolan_lab/root_midline_extraction'\)
from predict import build_model, predict_single

model = build_model\(device=torch.device\('cpu'\)\)
ckpt = torch.load\('models/root_midline_best.pth', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False\)
model.load_state_dict\(ckpt['model_state_dict']\)
model.eval\(\)

img = np.array\(Image.open\('D:/nolan_lab/image_preproccessing/drive-download-20260213T182802Z-1-002/adjusted/rice_10s_XY1766897188_Z0_T005_C0_enhanced.tiff'\)\)
print\('Image shape:', img.shape, 'dtype:', img.dtype, 'range:', img.min\(\), img.max\(\)\)

result = predict_single\(model, img, device=torch.device\('cpu'\)\)
print\('Midline coords found:', len\(result['midline_coords']\), 'points'\)
print\('QC point:', result['qc_point']\)
print\('BBox:', result['bbox']\)
mask_coverage = result['midline_mask'].sum\(\) / result['midline_mask'].size * 100
print\(f'Mask coverage: {mask_coverage:.2f}%'\)
" 2>&1)
